data.name: Forbidden Love with My Wife's Sister
data.detailed_description:
An erotic visual novel from Appetite!

Features

- 15 Intimate scenes
- 118 CGs (including variants)
- Fully voiced Heroine
- Multiple scene branches

Story

Handa Masayuki and Mayuka have finally gotten married after seven years together.

Today, they're moving into their new home, and Mayuka's sister, Natsume Sasa, has come over to help out.

"I'm okay over here, so could you help him out?"
Mayuka asks, and Sasa goes to help Masayuki.

While they work, Sasa pushes up close to Masayuki and suddenly says,
"I've loved you since we first met."
Masayuki stops working at the sudden confession.

Sasa approaches Masayuki and kisses him, but he tries to pull away to avoid being discovered.

Masayuki isn't in the mood, but Sasa tries to tempt him, lifting up her skirt.
"C'mon, let's do it... Nee-san's in the other room!"
Masayuki's lust rises higher and higher.

Just then, Mayuka enters the room.
Masayuki and Sasa hurriedly fix their clothes and pull apart.
Mayuka doesn't seem to suspect anything when Sasa acts like nothing happened.

Unable to resist Sasa's charms even if it means betraying his wife, Masayuki begins his secret affair with Sasa.
"You know how I feel, don't you, Onii-san? I'll be direct: go out with me."

data.short_description: Handa Masayuki and Mayuka have finally gotten married after seven years together. However Masayuki begins his secret affair with Mayuka's sister, Natsume Sasa. An erotic visual novel from Appetite!
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and up
  • 處理器: Pentium 4 1.30 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 32MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
